name: ReactiveBFM: Reactive Closed-Loop Motion Planning Towards Universal Humanoid Whole-Body Control
summary: arXiv:2606.30362v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: While current Behavior Foundation Models (BFMs) provide robust control priors for humanoids, they only execute pre-defined reference motion...
description: arXiv:2606.30362v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: While current Behavior Foundation Models (BFMs) provide robust control priors for humanoids, they only execute pre-defined reference motions. As a result, they are vulnerable to environmental shifts and incapable of reactive whole-body coordination. Naively cascading them with generative motion planners fails to achieve true reactivity,...
author: Xiao Chen, Weishuai Zeng, Xiaojie Niu, Zirui Wang, Jianan Li, Huayi Wang, Furui Xu, Jiahe Chen, Weixiang Zhong, Lihe Ding, Kailin Li, Jiangmiao Pang, Tai Wang, Tianfan Xue, Jingbo Wang
